channel.title: Flying on For Pets With Love! Everything you want for your pet's needs.
channel.description: Recent content in Flying on For Pets With Love! Everything you want for your pet's needs.

item.title: Flying with Pets: Airline Requirements Guide
item.description: Flying with Pets: Airline Requirements Guide Day of Travel Tips Before the Airport Exercise your pet thoroughly before departure Limit food 4-6 hours before flight Provide water until departure time Attach identification to carrier At the Airport Arrive early (2+ hours for domestic, 3+ for international) Keep health certificate accessible Have leash ready for security checks Remain calm to help your pet stay relaxed Post-Flight Care Upon Arrival Check your pet immediately for any distress Offer water and a small meal Allow time to rest and recover Monitor for any signs of illness Settling In Maintain familiar routines Provide comfort items from home Give extra attention and reassurance Watch for stress-related behaviors Special Considerations Brachycephalic Breeds Dogs and cats with flat faces (Pugs, Bulldogs, Persians) face higher risks during air travel:
